name: flui-spec-workspace
description: Workspace root for the Flui Spec.

scripts.sonar:scan: pnpm test:coverage && bash -c 'set -a && [ -f .env.local ] && source .env.local; set +a; docker run --rm -e SONAR_HOST_URL=${SONAR_HOST_URL:-http://host.docker.internal:9000} -e SONAR_TOKEN=$SONAR_TOKEN -e SONAR_SCANNER_OPTS="-Dsonar.projectKey=${SONAR_PROJECT_KEY:-FluiSpec}" -v "$PWD:/usr/src" sonarsource/sonar-scanner-cli'
